zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana MacDougall of Dunollie and Lorne於大約1248年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾登利時，她的父親Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill37歲，母親Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia45歲。她和Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1297年之後在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana MacDougall of Dunollie and Lorne was born about 1248, in Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill, was 37 and her mother, Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, was 45. She had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles. She died after 1297, in Argyll, Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana MacDougall of Dunollie and Lorne(이)가 대략 1248년 스컷랜드 아그이 던리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 이후 스컷랜드 아그이에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana MacDougall of Dunollie and Lorne родилась около 1248 г. в местности дунолли, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Eóghan " MacDougall" Macdubhghaill было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eugena MacDonnchadh De Ergadia, 45. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Aonghus Og MacDohmnaill of the Isles. Она умерла после 1297 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия.
